mapper.select: SELECT c.review_no, c.plan_no, tp.plan_title, c.user_no, c.review_content, c.review_rating AS rating, NVL(u.user_nickname, u.user_name) AS created_by, c.created_at AS created_at FROM Community c LEFT JOIN Travel_Plans tp ON tp.plan_no = c.plan_no LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = c.user_no WHERE c.plan_no = #{planNo} AND c.review_content IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.review_no DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM Community c JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = c.USER_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value} AND c.REVIEW_CONTENT IS NOT NULL

SELECT r.review_no, r.plan_no, r.plan_title, r.user_no, r.review_content, r.rating, r.created_by, r.created_at FROM ( SELECT c.review_no, c.plan_no, tp.plan_title, c.user_no, c.review_content, c.review_rating AS rating, NVL(u.user_nickname, u.user_name) AS created_by, c.created_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.review_no ASC
ORDER BY NVL(c.review_rating, 0) DESC, c.created_at DESC, c.review_no DESC
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.review_no DESC
) AS rn FROM Community c JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = c.USER_NO LEFT JOIN Travel_Plans tp ON tp.plan_no = c.plan_no LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = c.user_no WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{authId} AND c.review_content IS NOT NULL ) r WHERE r.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY r.rn

SELECT c.review_no, c.plan_no, tp.plan_title, c.user_no, c.review_content, c.review_rating AS rating, NVL(u.user_nickname, u.user_name) AS created_by, c.created_at AS created_at FROM Community c LEFT JOIN Travel_Plans tp ON tp.plan_no = c.plan_no LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = c.user_no WHERE c.plan_no = #{planNo} AND c.user_no = #{userNo} AND c.review_content IS NOT NULL
